title: Integration test secretx-azure-kv against real Azure Key Vault
description:
Run the live integration tests for the azure-kv backend against a real Azure Key Vault. Tests exist but have never been run against a live service.

**Why:** The azure-kv backend is published but unverified. The credential chain (managed-identity vs developer vs chained), field extraction, and the split_path slash-rejection fix are all untested end-to-end.

**Setup required:**
1. Azure subscription (free tier works)
2. az login (Azure CLI)
3. Create a Resource Group and Key Vault instance
4. Create one plain string secret and one JSON string secret (for field extraction test)
5. Assign yourself Key Vault Secrets Officer role on the vault

**Run with:**
SECRETX_AZURE_TEST=1 SECRETX_AZURE_VAULT=myvaultname SECRETX_AZURE_SECRET=my-secret SECRETX_AZURE_SECRET_JSON=my-json-secret SECRETX_AZURE_FIELD=password cargo test -p secretx-azure-kv

**Acceptance:** All integration tests pass (get, refresh, field_extraction). Update beads memory and the integration test status table in README.md.
